name: bounceLoop
purpose: Endless bouncing — the element springs up and falls back (translateY, 0-50-100 keyframes with ease-out; compositor-friendly).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-bounceLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s cubic-bezier(0.28, 0.84, 0.42, 1) infinite; }
@keyframes motion-bounceLoop-{{css id}} { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) } 50% { transform: translateY(-{{css params.distance}}) } }
